definition: IaC artifacts or definitions that are not reachable from same-repo references, cross-repo references, CI/CD workflows, deployment controllers, or deployment roots.

positive_cases: module repository referenced by a cross-repo Terraform or Terragrunt source
negative_cases: local module directory with no same-repo or cross-repo reference
ambiguous_cases: dynamic module source built from variables or helper expressions
remote source that does not resolve to an indexed repository

positive_cases: chart reached by ArgoCD Application or ApplicationSet source
chart reached by workflow helm command
chart reached by Kustomize helmCharts reference
negative_cases: chart directory with no controller, workflow, or local reference
ambiguous_cases: values-driven chart reference that cannot be resolved statically

positive_cases: overlay reached by ArgoCD Application source path
negative_cases: base or overlay directory with no ArgoCD, ApplicationSet, or kustomization reference

positive_cases: playbook invoked by Jenkins or GitHub Actions
negative_cases: role directory with no playbook import/include and no controller invocation
playbook file with no workflow/controller/root reference
ambiguous_cases: external collection role that is not expected to resolve to a local repo artifact

positive_cases: service reached by Docker Compose workflow command
service reached by Docker Compose controller command
negative_cases: compose service with no workflow or controller reference
ambiguous_cases: dynamic service name selected from workflow or controller variables

required_truth_surfaces: Postgres evidence rows explaining each finding
API /api/v0/iac/dead with truth envelope and limitations
MCP find_dead_iac tool after API contract is proven
